target: Define and harden the shell boundary so tmux-host correctness no longer depends on interactive shell startup behavior.
invariants: Keep tmux-host as an external host runtime; do not bake Dopemux-specific ownership into host core.
Preserve the source-first repo structure under src/tmux_host/ and the UI docs under docs/ui/.
Do not add broad allowlists or unrelated cleanup.
.zshrc must be interactive-only and not required for host correctness.

steps.task: Document the shell boundary for tmux-host, including what belongs in .zshenv, what belongs in .zshrc, and what must stay in host-owned entrypoints.
requirements: Treat shell docs as operator guidance only.
Do not claim .zshrc is required for correctness.
Keep the boundary consistent with the explicit env contract.

steps.task: Add bootstrap entrypoint stubs for ensure and SSH handoff so host-owned startup paths exist outside shell rc ownership.
requirements: Create only bounded entrypoint stubs or thin wrappers here.
Do not implement lifecycle logic in full.

steps.task: Add a narrow shell-boundary regression check or doc test so future packets do not quietly move correctness back into shell startup.
requirements: Keep the check narrow and structure-oriented.
Do not start modifying actual user dotfiles in this packet.
